projectDescription: An AI-powered personalized learning assistant that combines multi-agent systems, RAG, knowledge graphs, and interactive tools to help users master complex topics through document Q&A, guided learning, practice generation, deep research, and idea synthesis.
keyFeatures: Multi-agent problem solving with dual-loop reasoning (Analysis Loop + Solve Loop) and real-time WebSocket streaming
RAG-powered knowledge base supporting PDF, TXT, and Markdown documents with hybrid and naive retrieval modes
Intelligent question generation with custom and exam-mimic modes, powered by a ReAct-based agent
Guided learning with interactive HTML visualizations and context-aware Q&A sessions
Deep Research system (DR-in-KG) with dynamic topic queue, parallel execution, and academic citation management
Idea generation via automated multi-stage filtering and interactive Co-Writer with TTS narration
Personal notebook for organizing and connecting outputs across all learning modules
Docker and manual deployment options with multi-architecture support (AMD64 + ARM64)
publicApiSurface: POST /api/v1/solve — Submit a question for multi-agent solving with WebSocket streaming
POST /api/v1/research/start — Start a deep research session on a topic
GET/POST /api/v1/knowledge — List, create, and manage knowledge bases
POST /api/v1/question/generate — Generate custom or exam-mimic questions
GET/POST /api/v1/notebook — Manage notebooks and learning records
POST /api/v1/co_writer/edit — AI-assisted text editing (rewrite, shorten, expand)
POST /api/v1/guide/start — Start a guided learning session from notebook content
POST /api/v1/ideagen/generate — Generate research ideas from knowledge points
GET /api/v1/dashboard — Retrieve activity statistics and system overview
GET/POST /api/v1/settings — Read and update LLM/embedding configuration
